overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a dense, foggy forest. The character approaches and passes a small wooden shrine before continuing toward a gothic church with a tall spire, eventually reaching an iron gate at the church entrance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path through dense foggy woods

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees with thick trunks rising into the fog
dense shrubs and ferns lining the path
dense shrubs and ferns lining the path
decaying fallen tree trunk lying beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense, foggy forest with tall pine trees barely visible through the mist. The narrow dirt trail is flanked by thick undergrowth and fallen logs, creating an enclosed, atmospheric environment with diffused morning light filtering through the canopy.

events.description: wooden shrine structure becomes visible through the fog ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward and then past a small wooden shrine structure

entered.detail: small wooden gazebo-like structure with mossy roof and red interior elements

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a small wooden shrine with a moss-covered roof emerges from the fog. The character passes the shrine on the right side, revealing its weathered stone base and red interior, before continuing deeper into the misty woods.

events.description: gothic church with tall spire becomes visible through the fog in the distance
character stops at the iron gate entrance to the church grounds

agents.ego_description: walking toward the church entrance and stopping at the gate

entered.detail: large stone church with tall pointed spire and gothic architecture visible through the mist
wrought iron gate with stone pillars marking the entrance to the church grounds
low stone wall running alongside the path
low stone wall running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The forest opens slightly to reveal a gothic church with a tall spire looming through the fog. The character approaches an iron gate flanked by stone walls, which marks the entrance to the church grounds. The character stops at the gate, facing the imposing stone structure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, misty forest that gradually opens up to reveal an imposing gothic landmark. It begins on a narrow dirt trail flanked by thick undergrowth and fallen logs, where tall pine trees are barely visible through a dense, diffused morning fog. As the character advances, a small wooden shrine with a moss-covered roof and red interior emerges from the mist, serving as a brief waypoint before the path leads deeper into the woods. The environment then expands as the trees thin, revealing a gothic church with a tall spire looming through the haze. The camera finally follows the character to a stop at an iron gate flanked by stone walls, facing the imposing structure ahead.
